# Feyijimi Erinle (Erin)

> Lead AI Engineer and AI Systems Architect based in Lagos, Nigeria, working
> at Refactrd. Specializes in AI agents, retrieval-augmented generation,
> multi-agent systems, workflow automation, and AI solution architecture
> for startups and enterprise teams.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of services, architecture approach, and featured AI systems.
- [About](/about): Background, career journey, philosophy, and approach to AI projects.
- [Architecture](/architecture): Architecture principles, case studies, and design patterns.
- [Projects](/projects): Case studies including Kora (enterprise knowledge assistant),
  Quill (AI proposal generator), and Atlas (multi-agent research platform).
- [Insights](/insights): Research notes and frameworks on AI systems.
- [Contact](/contact): Ways to get in touch.
